pi_items.verified_value: Three-bladed, upwind, variable-speed, variable blade-pitch-to-feather-controlled offshore wind turbine

pi_items.source: Cannot verify without actual QBlade .wpa sample project file; 50 KB is reasonable estimate for project with turbine geometry and simulation results

privileged_info_summary: The task involves simulating the NREL 5-MW Reference Turbine, a real offshore wind turbine specification. Verified specifications: rated power 5000 kW (5 MW), rated wind speed 11.4 m/s, cut-in speed 3 m/s, cut-out speed 25 m/s, maximum power coefficient (Cp) approximately 0.4862. The metadata value for max_cp_max of 0.593 is contradicted—this is the theoretical Betz limit for any wind turbine, not the actual NREL 5MW Cp maximum. The metadata ranges are generally conservative and reasonable: power range of 1000-10000 kW brackets the actual 5000 kW rated power; rated speed range of 8-16 m/s brackets the actual 11.4 m/s; Cp range of 0.1-0.593 includes but exceeds the actual operating range.
